## Security checklist

<!-- Complete for any PR that touches auth, input handling, API routes, cookies, or secrets. -->

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, or secrets are introduced or logged
- [ ] User-supplied input is validated and/or sanitised before use
- [ ] New API endpoints are covered by appropriate auth middleware
- [ ] CSP / security headers are unaffected or intentionally updated
